# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Continuous Deployment

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build project
        run: npm run build

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

  deploy-to-production:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-test

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install --only=production

      - name: Deploy to production
        run: |
          # Add deployment commands here, e.g., deploying to a server or cloud service
          echo "Deploying to production..."
